removals.reason: Added explicit MutationGuard propagation so external ACP controller and participant event forwarders cannot lose the active Turn fence before durable persistence.
Preserve normalized ACP raw output and content alongside raw input so built-in and external approval adapters share one lossless semantic contract.
The old name falsely implied durable continuation; v0.25 stabilization replaced it with process-local RunNotAttachableError.
The old error contract was removed with ambiguous Resume and replaced by RunNotAttachableError.
Approval resolution and process-local live attachment are separate capabilities; durable replay across unknown side effects is not supported.
Renamed to AttachLiveRunRequest to make the process-local non-durable contract explicit.
Replaced by RunNotAttachableError after narrowing Resume to honest live-process attachment.
OutputModeToolOnly had no provider implementation and silently degraded; it was removed before v1 while supported modes gained fail-closed validation.
Replaced by AttachLiveRun so callers cannot mistake in-process observation for durable continuation.
Added stable SpawnID required for restart-safe spawn saga idempotency.
Added independent journal and pause-token schema kinds so nested raw records cannot bypass migration.
Added TransactionID to deduplicate the complete event-derived state delta on compound retries.
Added transaction identity and prior-application state for compound idempotency.
Added transaction recording output needed to atomically persist compound retry identity.
Added typed invalid-transaction and lease-conflict errors; existing error values remain unchanged.
Added prepared and unknown-outcome saga states required for crash-safe subagent spawning.
Added neutral Principal so SDK authorization no longer interprets product source strings.
Added stable SpawnID and neutral participant Role while removing unused ParentTool product provenance.
Removed Resumable because no runtime produced or consumed it; unknown tool outcomes use Recoverer and durable execution identity instead.
Added concrete ExecutionRequirements so Control can validate the actual sandbox selected for each assembled tool set.
Added an explicit mutation guard so Runtime writes are atomically fenced after lease takeover.
Added an explicit mutation guard so batched Runtime writes are atomically fenced after lease takeover.
Added explicit Runtime or Control mutation authority for controller binding writes.
Added explicit Runtime or Control mutation authority for atomic controller handoff writes.
Added explicit lease fencing for participant binding writes.
Added explicit lease fencing for atomic participant attach writes.
Added explicit lease fencing for participant detach writes.
Added explicit lease fencing for atomic participant detach writes.
Added a persistent monotonic fencing token that remains stable across heartbeats and changes on every acquisition.
Added delegation and attachment-generation preconditions so stale compensation cannot remove a newer live participant endpoint.
Added durable live attachment generation required to reconcile participant ledger identity with the exact endpoint instance.
